caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio against a background of gray acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional silver microphone held by a shock mount; the mounting arm features the text " Rode Procaster XLR". The man speaks into the microphone while gesturing with his left hand, which is raised in the air. A tattoo is visible on his right upper arm. As the sequence progresses, he continues talking, and his facial expressions shift slightly while his hand moves in a waving or emphasizing motion above his shoulder. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up shot, focusing on his head and torso throughout the clip.
